title: Gaia Skill Suite
description: A curated bundle of named skills from one contributor, organized into labeled sub-suites with a capstone fusion skill and custom installation support.

id.description: Suite identifier in contributor/name format, matching the capstone named skill ID.

capstone.description: Named skill ID of the apex fusion for the entire tree.

suites.description: Ordered list of sub-suites. Install order follows array order.

id.description: Short slug for the sub-suite, used with --suite flag.

fusion.description: Named skill ID of the suite's capstone fusion. Null for single-skill suites.

members.description: Named skill IDs of individual skills in this sub-suite, in install order.

standalones.description: Named skill IDs of standalone skills not belonging to any sub-suite.
